title: Minecraft: Age of Exploration
description: Explore Minecraft in a completely new way, never knowing what is around the corner.
body:
Minecraft: Age of Exploration

Embark on an epic journey in Minecraft: Age of Exploration! This modpack transforms your Minecraft world into a vast, uncharted realm filled with new lands, ancient civilizations, and untold treasures.


Current Features: 

- New soundtrack
- multiplayer (thanks to essential mod)
- 2enhanced world generation
- 3a plethora of new structures and dungons
- various new survival features
- lots of quality-of-life details
- very many new blocks

Features im looking to add:
- a temprature system
- an addition to redstone (not quite the create mod, but something similar)
- Distant Horizons (its not yet because of the performance hit, once a more stable verson is released it will most likely be added)
- Physics mod (agin, not in yet because of the performance hit)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This modpack Is designed to be played without a shader, if you wish to plat with shaders simply add Iris then add a shader (disclaimer: Hyper Realistic Skies will not work with certain shaders)

I do not own anything in this modpack
